childhood.familyBackground: Born as the third son of Kim Joon-sung, a prominent figure who served as Deputy Prime Minister and Minister of Economic Planning during South Korea's Fifth Republic. His family has deep roots in Korean business and politics.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 김준성 명예회장(전 부총리 겸 경제기획원 장관)의 3남으로 태어났으며, 한국의 비즈니스 및 정치계에 깊은 뿌리를 두고 있다.
childhood.education: Graduated from Seoul National University with a degree in Business Administration. Additionally studied in the United States.
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in a prominent business family. His father's political and business background provided significant influence on his career trajectory. In his early professional career, he worked internationally, gaining experience in law and business across different countries.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 저명한 사업가 가문에서 성장했으며, 아버지의 정치적·사업적 배경이 경력 진로에 큰 영향을 미쳤다. 초기 경력에는 국제 무대에서 법무 및 사업 경험을 쌓았다.
childhood.source: Forbes, Bloomberg, Korean business media (E-Today, Business Post, Herald Business)

careerTimeline.event: Began work as a lawyer at Debevoise & Plimpton LLP in the United States
careerTimeline.eventKo: 미국 Debevoise & Plimpton LLP에서 변호사로 근무 시작

careerTimeline.event: Joined Daewoo Group as Director of International Legal Affairs
Became Representative Director of ISU Chemical Industries
Assumed position as Vice Chairman of ISU Group
Became Chairman of ISU Group, taking over leadership from previous management
careerTimeline.eventKo: 이수그룹 회장 취임, 그룹 경영의 최고 지위 확보

careerTimeline.event: ISU Petasys stock surged 487% as AI boom drove demand for advanced circuit boards, significantly increasing personal wealth
careerTimeline.eventKo: AI 붐으로 인해 이수페타시스 주가가 487% 급등하면서 개인 자산 크게 증가

careerTimeline.event: Became recognized as South Korea's newest billionaire with net worth exceeding $1 billion as AI demand continued to fuel ISU Petasys growth
careerTimeline.eventKo: AI 수요 지속으로 순자산이 10억 달러를 초과하면서 한국의 최신 억만장자로 인정받음

careerTimeline.event: Attended CES 2026 to discuss AI-centered future strategy for ISU Group
careerTimeline.eventKo: CES 2026 참관하여 이수그룹의 AI 중심 미래 전략 구상

personalTraits.knownFor: Strategic leadership of ISU Group and its transformation into a major player in the global printed circuit board industry. Known for expanding ISU's business portfolio and capitalizing on technological trends, particularly the AI chip revolution. Maintains extraordinary control over ISU Group through holding approximately 99.9% of the parent holding company, an unusual level of concentration.
personalTraits.knownForKo: 이수그룹의 전략적 리더십과 세계 인쇄회로기판 산업의 주요 플레이어로의 변신. ISU의 사업 포트폴리오 확대와 기술 트렌드, 특히 AI 칩 혁명 활용으로 알려짐. 모회사의 약 99.9% 지분을 보유하여 이수그룹에 대한 비범한 지배력 유지.
